scripts.dev: concurrently --names "AUTH,USER,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev -w auth-service" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w admin-service"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --names "AUTH,USER,ADMIN,GW,EXEC,RISK" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow,magenta,blue,red" "npm run dev -w auth-service" "npm run dev -w user-service" "npm run dev -w admin-service" "npm run dev -w order-gateway" "npm run dev -w execution-service" "npm run dev -w risk-service"
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml --profile localdb --profile messaging up -d
